generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about defense—it's about protecting our way of life. While some worry about civil liberties, the real threat comes from those who'd exploit our openness. Strong national security means we can focus on what matters: community, safety, and preparedness. #SecureOurFuture
